name: chr4q_telomere
description: q-arm telomere of chr4. TTAGGG hexameric tandem repeat extending several kb inward from the chromosome end (3' end on the reference strand). Subtelomeric region interior to it harbours TAR1, WASH-family duplications, and chromosome-end-specific segmental duplications. In GRCh38 the 10 kb at the 3' end of the chromosome is a telomere gap (N-stretch); T2T-CHM13 resolves the actual TTAGGG array length.
expected_copy_count: 300-2500 tandem TTAGGG hexamers (~2-15 kb of array) per chromosome end; declines with age and proliferation
